sourceTitle: UQ's rules for using AI in assessment
evidenceSnippetOriginal: In semester 1, 2026 the options in course profiles for each assessment remain the same as semester 2, 2025, these are: Option 1: Cannot use AI. AI is prohibited through in-person assessment. Option 2: Can use AI. AI use must be referenced.
evidenceLocator: UQ's approach to AI use and academic integrity expectations section
rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
